coupon.source_phrase_block: Pass admits 1 visitor free of charge. Only 1 coupon per group allowed. For ticket pricing and hours, please refer to The Butterfly Place website. https://butterflyplace-ma.com/schedule/ This coupon pass can be picked up one week in advance. The physical coupon must be brought to the Butterfly Place to receive the discount admission; the confirmation email is NOT the coupon/pass. You must visit the library with your library card or ID to pick up the reserved pass before visiting the Butterfly Place.
